message:
fix(runtime): reject duplicate lane configs and derive compat-gate mode from scope state

Two targeted correctness fixes:

lane_scheduler: LaneMappingPolicy::add_lane() now returns Result and
fails with ERR_LANE_DUPLICATE when a lane key already exists, preventing
silent config overwrites via BTreeMap::insert last-writer-wins. New
DuplicateLane error variant added with code() and Display. default_policy()
chains .expect() on each add_lane() call. New regression test verifies
duplicate is rejected and original config is preserved. Test helper
add_lane_ok() introduced to reduce boilerplate across ~12 existing tests.
All existing test call sites updated.

compat_gate: CompatGateService mode-transition logic now reads the actual
current mode from self.scopes.get(&request.scope_id) instead of trusting
request.from_mode, closing a potential escalation-check bypass where a
caller could lie about their current mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
